title: Boulder Co 4/9/18 Rest Day. Rode 10 Minutes. Knee Blown

enrichment.summary: Kyle is in Boulder, CO on a rest day after several days of training. He rode rollers for only 10 minutes before stopping due to a blown knee, and reflects on his minimal food intake for the day and physical soreness from recent efforts. He briefly mentions working on his website and plans to swim tomorrow instead.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Not worth it — stopped after 10 minutes because pushing through is just going to make the injury worse
Reluctant to take them — had to force himself to stop even with a painful knee
Wants to add explanatory content to his pages but needs to be mentally sharp enough to do it properly

transcript.text: Hello, Livin' in Bold V-log at 7.38pm on April 9th.
So, yesterday, I think it was pretty late when I did my video.
I had done three sports yesterday for the first time.
Today, I had to do labor stuff and came back at like 5 or whatever and I rode like 10 minutes.
At first, I wasn't going to do anything.
Today was going to be my very first day off since I decided to start exercising again.
But, I got really high and I was like, ah, fuck it, let's just go riding on the rollers.
So, I started riding on the rollers.
I did 10 minutes but then, yeah, I realized it was stupid because my knee was totally blown to hell.
All I'm going to do is hurt my knee and it was really painful.
So, yeah, I'm not going to be able to do it tomorrow.
Tomorrow, I would like to get up and go to the store and buy a swimsuit and something to make it so that the nose plug stays on my nose.
Maybe they have some kind of stick cream.
And, yeah, run and swim.
That's what I'll do tomorrow.
I was trying to work on my website and I was a little bit too stupid because I'm tired.
I made this chart that shows how many watts you do for how fast you go with different gears and I was looking at it and it wasn't making sense to me.
So, I want to get into that page.
I want to start making manuals to all my pages, make sense to my pages and then explain them so that they make sense.
Um, but I have to be at a certain level of intellectuality to be able to do that or look at it long enough to, whew, what I'm going to do is just jump in bed right now.
I've got my computer here.
I'm making videos that I can use and, um, for my writing and, um, uh, yeah, I just make videos and look at my site and just decipher it.
Um, I haven't really eaten much today.
Didn't have much of a breakfast.
I had like a, what was it, like a banana and an avocado and an apple for breakfast and then an apple for dinner.
Um, yeah, now I'm, I know it's some fruit and that's it.
So my appetite hasn't kicked in, but I feel tired all over.
You know, I went swimming and running for the first time yesterday.
Whew.
I ran five and a half miles and swam like almost a mile and, but my calves, so my calves are sore and my arms are sore.
I also did the, the, I was in the weight room and I did this one when you pull down.
So this part's pretty sore.
So yeah, it's enough muscles for me to take it out.
So anyways, so that's enough talking.
Um, I'm going to go lay in bed now and later.
